title: Crazy Combat
description: Adds new armor, tools and other combat-related features to Minecraft.
body:
This mod adds new tools, armor and other features to Minecraft for combat.

This includes:

- Copper Armor and tools (self explanatory)
- Emerald Armor and tools (self explanatory)
- Amethyst Armor and tools (self explanatory)
- Prismarine Armor and tools - Chestplate has built in conduit (included in recipe).
- A new material called firestone, found in the nether. It grants fire resistance and doesn't burn in fire or lava.
- Another new material called celestium, found in the end. It is stronger than netherite.
- Enderite, a metal from the end. (self explanatory)
- A new material called ruby - a deprecated feature that Mojang never added, so I did instead.
- Jade, which generates in geodes.
- Potion of resonance, brewed with jade shards.
- Chainmail recipes, using iron ingots.
- Some changes to the warden's loot table. It now drops its heart (currently useless), as well as having a chance to drop echo shards, and an echo upgrade. The Echo shards and echo upgrade can be used on amethyst armor to make echo armor, the most powerful armor in the game.
- The mod adds battleaxes, a more powerful (but expensive) axe, and daggers, a faster option for the sword.
- The mod also adds a roman shield and viking shield for variety.
- Adds several new and wanted recipes, such as for totems, enchanted apples and tridents. (I suggest using JEI to figure them out)
- This mod includes redstone energy drink, which gives you strength and resistance, and tropical juice, a soothing drink that heals health.
- Foods such as ender sushi, a nutritious version of the chorus fruit and glowstone cookies, which give you glowing and night vision.
- New enchantments, such as wither aspect (gives wither effect), Ender swipe (like knockback, but has chance to teleport enemy instead), Echoing Blade (can double hit enemies), and Berserker (applied to battleaxes, has chance to give strength effect when critting).
- Adds cherries (dropped by cherry leaves).

This mod is experimental, so please comment any bugs and I will do my best to fix them. A few known issues include certain problems with the rendering of 3D armor and items.

Also, feel free to share any screenshots, and I might post them in the images section.

This mod was made using Blockbench and MCreator. They're both free, so I encourage you to check them out.

Here's the link to this mod's curseforge and MCreator pages:

[https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/crazy-combat]

[https://mcreator.net/modification/109942/crazy-combat]
